summary: Matched `fn_8003F654` in `src/melee/pl/plbonuslib.c`, added a local inline sqrt helper shaped around `__frsqrte`, removed an unused `MSL/math_ppc.h` include, and changed `configure.py` so `melee/pl/plbonuslib.c` is treated as a Matching object. The PR body claims `python configure.py --require-protos`, `ninja`, `fn_8003F654` 100.0%, and `plbonuslib.c` `.text`, `.data`, and `.sdata2` 100.0%; the bot report corroborates new matches for `fn_8003F654` and `.sdata2`.

key_files.role: Matched `fn_8003F654`; added `my_sqrtf`; removed `MSL/math_ppc.h`; refactored locals/control flow/calls to match code and `.sdata2` layout.

what_changed.text: A `static inline float my_sqrtf(float x)` helper was added using `__frsqrte`, three Newton refinement steps, local `const double half = 0.5`, `const double three = 3.0`, a small `u8 _[4]` local, and a volatile float return path.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: helper uses local double constants so codegen matches without adding extra .sdata2 local statics

what_changed.text: `fn_8003F654` was rewritten with different local declarations and helper calls including `pl_Verify_gm_8016AEDC`, `pl_CheckIfSameTeam`, `pl_CalculateAverage`, `my_sqrtf`, and typed names such as `table`, `entity`, `teammate_table`, `other_pos`, and `cam_pos`.
The PR body reports verification with `python configure.py --require-protos`, `ninja`, `fn_8003F654`: 100.0%, and `plbonuslib.c`: `.text`, `.data`, and `.sdata2` all 100.0%.
The automated GALE01 report lists two new matches: `main/melee/pl/plbonuslib` `fn_8003F654` from 75.24% to 100.00% and `.sdata2` from 83.33% to 100.00%.

decomp_lessons.lesson: For code-matching work where math helper constants perturb `.sdata2`, try local constants inside a narrowly scoped helper before adding new static data symbols.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: helper uses local double constants so function codegen matches without adding extra .sdata2 local statics
raw_diff: my_sqrtf uses local const double half and three

decomp_lessons.lesson: Unused includes can affect generated small-data layout; removing an include may be part of matching `.sdata2`, not just style cleanup.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: unused MSL/math_ppc.h include is removed so generated .sdata2 layout matches the target object

decomp_lessons.lesson: Promote a translation unit from NonMatching to Matching only with narrow function and section verification, including text and relevant data sections.
evidence_refs: text_corpus: bot report lists fn_8003F654 and .sdata2 new matches

naming_conventions.text: The PR replaced generic/decompiler-style locals such as `t`, `gobj`, `srcType`, `sp44`, and `sp38` with role-oriented names including `table`, `entity`, `teammate_slot`, `teammate_table`, `other_pos`, and `cam_pos`.
Some temporary or matching-shaped names remain, such as `new_var`, `b34_result`, `b34`, `prev_pos2`, and `abs`; treat them as PR-local matching artifacts rather than proven global naming style.

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use `__frsqrte` plus repeated Newton refinement in a static inline helper to reproduce sqrt-like codegen for positive inputs.
evidence_refs: raw_diff: my_sqrtf body with __frsqrte and three refinement assignments

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Use local `const double` values for `0.5` and `3.0` in the helper to avoid extra `.sdata2` local statics while matching codegen.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: local double constants avoid extra .sdata2 local statics
raw_diff: const double half = 0.5; const double three = 3.0

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: Remove unused `MSL/math_ppc.h` include when it changes `.sdata2` layout and the target object expects the layout without it.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: unused MSL/math_ppc.h include removed so generated .sdata2 layout matches

assembly_or_matching_tactics.tactic: The matched form used explicit temporaries and expanded arithmetic/branch structure in `fn_8003F654`, including manual absolute-value branches and staged average calculations through `pl_CalculateAverage`.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Local helper constants can avoid `.sdata2` churn in math-codegen matches
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2568 matched `fn_8003F654` by adding `my_sqrtf` with local `const double` constants for `0.5` and `3.0`; the PR body states this matched codegen without adding extra `.sdata2` local statics.

accepted_candidate_records.title: Include cleanup may be required for section layout
accepted_candidate_records.text: PR #2568 removed unused `MSL/math_ppc.h`; the PR body says this made the generated `.sdata2` layout match the target object.

source_update_candidates.title: plbonuslib.c marked Matching in PR #2568
source_update_candidates.text: `configure.py` changed `melee/pl/plbonuslib.c` from `Object(NonMatching, ...)` to `Object(Matching, ...)`. The PR body reports `plbonuslib.c` `.text`, `.data`, and `.sdata2` all 100.0%, and the bot report lists new matches for `fn_8003F654` and `.sdata2`.
source_update_candidates.reason: This is a source/path status fact and should be curated as path metadata rather than treated as a general decomp lesson.

source_update_candidates.title: Consider documenting include-driven small-data layout sensitivity
source_update_candidates.text: PR #2568 provides an example where removing an unused include was necessary for `.sdata2` layout matching. If repeated in other PRs, standards could mention that include changes may affect data-section layout and need verification.
evidence_refs: human_pr_text: unused MSL/math_ppc.h include removed so generated .sdata2 layout matches target object
source_update_candidates.reason: Potential standards refinement, but one PR should not by itself become a global rule without curator review and corroborating examples.

rejection_notes: Do not generalize `my_sqrtf` as the canonical sqrt replacement globally; the evidence only supports this helper in `plbonuslib.c` for `fn_8003F654`.
Do not treat temporary names like `new_var`, `b34_result`, or `prev_pos2` as naming conventions; they appear matching-shaped and PR-local.
Do not infer reviewer intent or requested changes; no review comments were loaded.
